texto: Every book is a safe heaven, many people don't see it but I do.I see my chance to escape and be safe, I see the choice to stop or jump over the yelling, I see the key to help me get a better person.I see not different worlds, no, I see my universe.
explicacao: Citação de I wrote it sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Every book is a safe heaven, many people don't see it but I do.I see my chance to escape and be s…” articula reflexao, life-and-living, every em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
